name: Aionda Browser MCP
description: Attach a Chrome tab to a local MCP browser automation relay.

action.default_title: Attach tab to Aionda Browser MCP

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* ws://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://localhost:*;
